caption: A digital display shows changing numbers, with a "VG" logo in the upper right corner. Initially, the display reads "46.58" above "10.979", then shifts to "47.1cy" above "10.001". The scene then transitions to a close-up of a person's hands handling a stack of United States currency. The individual, whose clothing is not visible, holds and flips through a thick wad of dollar bills, moving their thumb across the edges of the banknotes to count or sort them. The background in these shots is blurred, showing a light-colored indoor setting with some indistinct equipment on a surface. The focus remains strictly on the digital readouts and the manual manipulation of the money.
